login.title: Dungeon Crawler
login.emailMalformed: Please enter a valid email address.
login.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

kick.duplicate: You were disconnected because your account logged in from another session.
kick.kicked: You have been kicked from the dungeon by an administrator.
kick.dungeonStarted: The dungeon expedition has already started. Wait for the next run.
kick.versionMismatch: Your client is outdated. Please refresh the page to get the latest version.

pause.title: Paused
pause.resetTutorialsMessage: All tutorial hints will be shown again. This cannot be undone.
pause.leaveRoomMessage: You will be permanently removed from this dungeon and will not be able to rejoin.

character.title: Character
character.agilityTip: Increases move speed and attack speed
character.attackDamageTip: Damage dealt per hit (based on Strength)
character.defenseTip: Damage reduced per hit (based on Vitality)
character.attackSpeedTip: Seconds between attacks (based on Agility, lower is faster)
character.resetMessage: All attribute points will be refunded. This costs {{cost}} gold.

chat.reconnectExpired: {{name}} failed to reconnect and has been removed.
chat.adminRevived: {{name}} has been revived by divine intervention!
chat.rateLimited: You are sending messages too fast.
chat.killedByAdmin: {{name}} has been slain by divine intervention!
chat.gateLeaderOnly: Only the party leader can open the gate.
chat.gateOpened: The gate opens... The dungeon awaits!
chat.levelUpStatPoint: +1 attribute point! You have {{total}} to assign.
chat.levelUpTalentPoint: +1 talent point! You have {{total}} to assign.
chat.talentsReset: Talents reset for {{cost}} gold. {{points}} point(s) refunded.
chat.statsReset: Stats reset for {{cost}} gold. {{points}} point(s) refunded.

gate.promptMessage: Opening the gate will start the dungeon expedition for all players.

exit.promptMessage: This will end the expedition and close the dungeon for all players.

announce.gateCountdownStart: {{name}} is opening the gate in {{seconds}} seconds...
announce.gateOpened: The gate opens... The dungeon awaits!
announce.exitCombatActive: Cannot exit while enemies are in combat!
announce.exitNeedKey: You need the Dungeon Key to open the portal!

warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.desc: A sturdy melee fighter who excels in close combat.

skills.heavyStrikeDesc: A powerful blow that deals {{multiplier}}× damage
skills.executeDesc: Deals {{multiplier}}× damage to targets below {{threshold}}% health. Cooldown resets on kill.
skills.warCryDesc: Empowers nearby allies, increasing attack damage by 20% for 8s.
skills.groundSlamDesc: Slams the ground, dealing {{multiplier}}× damage to all enemies nearby and slowing them.
skills.clickToToggle: Click or press key to toggle
skills.clickToUse: Click or press key to use

tutorial.startDungeon: You are the party leader! Right-click the gate or press F nearby to start the dungeon.
tutorial.allocateStats: You have attribute points! Press C to open the character sheet and assign them.
tutorial.allocateTalents: You unlocked talents! Press N to open the talent tree and spend your points.
tutorial.sprint: Hold Shift while moving to sprint faster — but watch your stamina!
tutorial.youDowned: You've been downed! A teammate can revive you before you bleed out. You can still use the chat.
tutorial.teammateDowned: A teammate has fallen! Walk close and press R (or click Revive) to save them.
tutorial.firstDebuff: You've been hit with a debuff! Check the icons below your character to see its effect and remaining time.
tutorial.dungeonKey: You found the Dungeon Key! Use it at the exit portal to escape the dungeon.
tutorial.portalNoKey: You need the Dungeon Key to open the portal. Defeat the boss to obtain it!

welcome.subtitle: Explore procedural dungeons with your party
welcome.tip1: Fight creatures and level up to unlock new skills and talents.
welcome.tip2: If you fall, a teammate can revive you — stay close to your party!
welcome.tip3: Earn XP and gold from every kill. Assign attribute and talent points as you level up.
welcome.tip4: Defeat the dungeon boss to get the key and escape through the exit portal.

reconnect.title: Connection Lost
reconnect.message: Your session is still active on the server. You can try to reconnect.
reconnect.failed: Reconnection failed. Your session may have expired.

items.dungeonKeyDesc: Opens the exit portal. Lost when leaving the dungeon.
items.rustySwordDesc: A battered blade, still sharp enough to cut.
items.golemCrusherDesc: A massive weapon forged from golem stone.
items.stoneplateHelmDesc: A heavy helm reinforced with stone plates.
items.ringOfFuryDesc: A ring that pulses with destructive energy.

equipment.head: Head
equipment.levelTooLow: Level too low to equip this item

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.destroyMessage: Are you sure you want to destroy this item? This cannot be undone.

talents.title: Talents
talents.resetMessage: All talent points will be refunded. This costs {{cost}} gold.

warriorThickSkin.name: Thick Skin
warriorThickSkin.desc: Your skin becomes as tough as leather armor.

warriorBrutalStrikes.name: Brutal Strikes
warriorBrutalStrikes.desc: Your Heavy Strike becomes faster and more devastating.

warriorResilience.name: Resilience
warriorResilience.desc: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger.

warriorRendingBlow.name: Rending Blow
warriorRendingBlow.desc: Your Ground Slam tears through groups of enemies.

warriorBattleTempo.name: Battle Tempo
warriorBattleTempo.desc: War Cry invigorates you, shortening its downtime.

warriorUnbreakable.name: Unbreakable
warriorUnbreakable.desc: Your determination to survive is absolute.

warriorExecutioner.name: Executioner
warriorExecutioner.desc: You sense weakness and strike without mercy.

warriorWarRhythm.name: War Rhythm
warriorWarRhythm.desc: The cadence of battle quickens around you.

warriorLastStand.name: Last Stand
warriorLastStand.desc: When all seems lost, you refuse to fall.

warriorBerserker.name: Berserker
warriorBerserker.desc: You abandon restraint and fight with reckless fury.

warriorBattleMaster.name: Battle Master
warriorBattleMaster.desc: You have mastered the art of war.

death.downedSub: Wait for a teammate to revive you...

cmd.invalidQuantity: Quantity must be a positive number.
